llm.title: 🚨 The transformer’s biggest flaw just got fixed. Every LLM you’ve ever used compares every token...
llm.content: 🚨 The transformer’s biggest flaw just got fixed. Every LLM you’ve ever used compares every token to every other token. That’s O(n²) scaling. Double the context, quadruple the compute. It’s why long-context models are slow and expensive, and why they degrade as context grows. SubQ doesn’t do that. It’s the first frontier model built on a fully sub-quadratic sparse-attention architecture. It finds the token relationships that actually matter and skips the rest. At 12 million tokens, this cuts attention compute by almost 1,000x. The numbers: → 12M token context (others advertise 1M, accuracy collapses past 200k) → 98% accuracy at 12M tokens → 52x faster than FlashAttention at 1M → Less than 5% the cost of Opus 4.7 → 97.1% on RULER 128K vs Opus 4.7 at 97.2% → 83 on MRCR v2 vs GPT-5.4 at 39 Well done @alex_whedon, @subquadratic #subq Entire codebases. Six months of PRs. Millions of tokens of agent state. One prompt.
llm.selection_reason: Breakthrough sub-quadratic architecture model claiming 12M context and massive efficiency gains.
llm.summary: SubQ has launched a new frontier model utilizing a sub-quadratic sparse-attention architecture that bypasses traditional O(n²) scaling to efficiently process up to 12 million tokens.
llm.display_title: SubQ introduces sub-quadratic sparse-attention architecture to drastically reduce long-context compute costs
key_points: The model achieves 98% accuracy at a 12 million token context window by skipping irrelevant token relationships.
The architecture cuts attention compute by nearly 1,000x at 12 million tokens and operates 52x faster than FlashAttention at 1 million tokens.
SubQ costs less than 5% of Opus 4.7 while maintaining competitive benchmark scores like 97.1% on RULER 128K.

image_video.title: I spent 3 days debugging why our visual pipeline kept failing QA. Wrong outputs. Off-brand. Incon...
image_video.content: I spent 3 days debugging why our visual pipeline kept failing QA. Wrong outputs. Off-brand. Inconsistent. Every fix broke something else. Switched to Luma’s Uni-1 API. Wired it directly into our stack—feeds it the brief, brand refs, constraints. It reasons through everything before generating. First output passed QA. That was 6 weeks ago. The pipeline hasn't needed a prompt tweak since. One API call. Runs inside our product silently. Anywhere code runs, Uni-1 can think—images, visuals, thumbnails, whatever your pipeline needs at scale. Not a tool. A dependency. Try it yourself: https://t.co/fItGUHszUe #ai #LumaPartner

product_updates.title: OpenAI 更新了 GPT-5.5 Instant 模型，现在变成了 ChatGPT 默认模型。 模型提升了实时准确性和日常任务的表现，主要改进： 性能优化：在法律、金融、医学等领域的幻觉率明...
product_updates.content: OpenAI 更新了 GPT-5.5 Instant 模型，现在变成了 ChatGPT 默认模型。 模型提升了实时准确性和日常任务的表现，主要改进： 性能优化：在法律、金融、医学等领域的幻觉率明显下降。同时，在图片理解和文档解析方面表现更好。 表达风格：回答更加紧凑且聚焦要点，减少了无用的铺垫和过渡排版。简单来说就是废话变少了，之前的 5.5 版本（GPT-5.5）确实废话有点多。此外，个性化能力也得到了提升。 发布状态：今天已经全量发布。ChatGPT 已经将其设为默认模型，Codex 没有更新。 新功能引入：在 GPT 中引入了记忆来源功能。你可以通过控件可视化地查看 memory 来自什么地方，如果发现有问题，也可以直接编辑它。

product_updates.summary: Perplexity has introduced a dedicated platform for finance professionals that integrates licensed market data and automates repetitive analytical tasks.
product_updates.display_title: Perplexity Launches Specialized Enterprise Tool for Finance Teams with Licensed Data Integration
key_points: The platform supports licensed data ingestion from major providers including Morningstar, PitchBook, Daloopa, and Carbon Arc.
It includes 35 specialized workflows designed to automate routine weekly tasks for financial analysts.
The tool is specifically tailored to streamline research and data analysis for professional finance teams.
